children.name: hwMgmdHostInterfaceTable
children.description:
The (conceptual) table listing the interfaces on which
             IGMP or MLD is enabled.

children.name: hwMgmdGmpLimitGroupAddressType
children.description:
The address type of the multicast group address in the most
             recently sent IGMP or MLD limit trap. If this router has not
             sent a limit trap, this object is set to 0.

children.name: hwMgmdGmpBoardThreshold
children.description: The threshold value of IGMP or MLD entries uppper/lower limit(%) on the board.

children.name: hwMgmdTotalLimitCurrentCount
children.description: The current number of IGMP or MLD entries of all instances.

children.name: hwMgmdTotalLimitThreshold
children.description: The threshold value of IGMP or MLD entries uppper limit(%) of all instances.

children.name: hwMgmdHostSGTotalCount
children.description: The total number of IGMP or MLD proxy (S, G) entries of all instances.

children.name: hwMgmdGmpJoinGrpAddr
children.description: The IGMP or MLD group address to join.

children.name: hwMgmdHostStarGTotalCount
children.description: The total number of IGMP or MLD proxy (*, G) entries of all instances.

children.name: hwMgmdSource
children.description: Source address of the entry.

children.name: hwMgmdHostRerouteDelayPeriod
children.description:
The minimum time that must elapse between hostinterface down to up originated by this router.
            The value of 4294967295 represents an 'infinite' time, in
            which case, IGMP or MLD host interface is never up.

            The non-zero minimum allowed value provides resilience
            against propagation of denial-of-service attacks from the
            data and control planes to the network management plane.

children.name: hwMgmdGmpLimitGroup
children.description:
The multicast group address in the most recently sent IGMP 
             or MLD limit trap. The InetAddressType is defined by the   hwMgmdGmpLimitGroupAddressType object.

children.name: hwMgmdGmpIfCurrentCount
children.description: The current number of IGMP or MLD entries on the interface.

children.name: hwMgmdTotalEntries
children.description: The total number of IGMP or MLD entries of all instances.

children.name: hwMgmdHostSGCurrentCount
children.description: The current number of IGMP or MLD proxy (S, G) entries of all instances.

children.name: hwMgmdThresholdInterfaceIfIndex
children.description:
The interface from which an IGMP or a MLD Threshold trap is
             most recently sent. If this router has not sent a Threshold
             trap, this object is set to 0.

children.name: hwMgmdGmpJoinSenderIp
children.description: The host IP address for sending membership report.

children.name: hwMgmdTtlCheck
children.description: The status of IGMP or MLD ttl-check is enabled or not on this router.

children.name: hwMgmdGroup
children.description: Group address of the entry.

children.name: hwMgmdGmpInterfaceIfIndex
children.description:
The ifIndex value of the interface for which IGMP or MLD
            is enabled. The table is indexed by the ifIndex value and
            the InetAddressType to allow for interfaces which may be
            configured in both IPv4 and IPv6 modes.

children.name: hwMgmdGmpBoardCurrentCount
children.description: The current number of IGMP or MLD entries on the board.

children.name: hwMgmdNotificationAddressType
children.description:
The address type of the multicast group address in the most
             recently sent IGMP or MLD limit trap.

children.name: hwMgmdHostSGThreshold
children.description: The threshold value of IGMP or MLD proxy (S, G)entries uppper limit(%) of all instances.

children.name: hwMgmdInterfaceEntries
children.description: The total number of IGMP or MLD entries on the interface.

children.name: hwMgmdGmpInterfaceName
children.description:
The interface name of the interface for which IGMP or MLD
            is enabled.

children.name: hwMgmdGmpLimitSource
children.description: The source address in the most recently sent IGMP or MLD limit trap. The InetAddressType is defined by the hwMgmdGmpLimitGroupAddressType object.

children.name: hwMgmdNotificationSlot
children.description: The name of slot.

children.name: hwMgmdLimitInterfaceIfIndex
children.description:
The interface from which an IGMP or a MLD limit trap is
             most recently sent. If this router has not sent a limit
             trap, this object is set to 0.

children.name: hwMgmdHostStarGThreshold
children.description: The threshold value of IGMP or MLD proxy (*, G) entries uppper limit(%) of all instances.

children.name: hwMgmdGmpJoinSrcAddr
children.description: The IGMP or MLD source address to join.

children.name: hwMgmdHostRerouteImmediate
children.description: The status of IGMP or MLD host reroute is immidiatly or not on this router.

children.name: hwMgmdGmpBoardLimitCount
children.description: The limit number of IGMP or MLD entries on the board.

children.name: hwMgmdGlobalEntries
children.description: The total number of IGMP or MLD entries of this instance.

children.name: hwMgmdInstanceName
children.description: The instance name of the trap.

children.name: hwMgmdHostNotificationSrcAddr
children.description: The source address in the most recently sent IGMP or MLD proxy limit trap.

children.name: hwMgmdHostStarGCurrentCount
children.description: The current number of IGMP or MLD proxy (*, G) entries of all instances.

children.name: hwMgmdHostNotificationGrpAddr
children.description: The multicast group address in the most recently sent IGMP or MLD proxy limit trap.

children.name: hwMgmdGmpJoinVersion
children.description:
The version of MGMD which is running on this interface.
            Value 1 applies to IGMPv1 and MLDv1 version. Value 2 applies
            to IGMPv2 and MLDv2 version, and value 3 applies to IGMPv3
            version.
            This object can be used to configure a router capable of
            running either version.  For IGMP and MLD to function
            correctly, all routers on a LAN must be configured to run
            the same version on that LAN. This object MAY be
            modified under any rowstatus condition.
    DEFVAL     { 2 }

children.name: hwMgmdGmpIfThreshold
children.description: The threshold value of IGMP or MLD entries uppper limit(%) on the interface.
